items.name_en: HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag【M13084】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag【M13084】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
This Handbag East West Sj bag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami Re-edition series, depicting the full Monogram pattern with the artist's signature rainbow tones. The horizontal silhouette features fluid lines, top handles, nail-studded side straps, a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, and LV xTM key pouch, all accented with calfskin details. The refined corners pay homage to the brand's traditional trunks.
Size: 27 x 14 x 10 cm

specs.rawTitle:
HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag【M13084】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
This Handbag East West Sj bag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami Re-edition series, depicting the full Monogram pattern with the artist's signature rainbow tones. The horizontal silhouette features fluid lines, top handles, nail-studded side straps, a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, and LV xTM key pouch, all accented with calfskin details. The refined corners pay homage to the brand's traditional trunks.
Size: 27 x 14 x 10 cm

items.name_en: hanel 25A Haute Couture Suede Bag
items.name_cn:
hanel 25A Haute Couture Suede Bag
25A Haute Couture Focus of the Hangzhou Show🔥A masterpiece of classic and innovation👏🏻 Inspired by Mademoiselle Chanel's ebony lacquered screen; iconic quilted pattern, meets unique color blocking design, collision of materials💥 Fully displaying luxury;
Large bag body paired with exquisite small bag, “bag on bag” too bold an innovation🤩 Beauty and practicality combined! Super mini “Pearl Heart” CF charm is detachable, can match any large bag! This layered feeling is truly loved🥹
Dimensions: 36x24x12cm

specs.rawTitle:
hanel 25A Haute Couture Suede Bag
25A Haute Couture Focus of the Hangzhou Show🔥A masterpiece of classic and innovation👏🏻 Inspired by Mademoiselle Chanel's ebony lacquered screen; iconic quilted pattern, meets unique color blocking design, collision of materials💥 Fully displaying luxury;
Large bag body paired with exquisite small bag, “bag on bag” too bold an innovation🤩 Beauty and practicality combined! Super mini “Pearl Heart” CF charm is detachable, can match any large bag! This layered feeling is truly loved🥹
Dimensions: 36x24x12cm

items.name_en: Haze Blue 🎉Prada new nylon Hobo handbag/crossbody 😘😘 viral among internet influencers and popular in the fashion circle! Hobo is out with a new style! 👏👏 This Hobo bag design is amazing 👍👍 Multi-use 😘😘 waist bag/shoulder bag/crossbody 👍👍 Handle replaced with chain, adds a touch of sexiness as a shoulder bag, also comes with a long strap, love that the strap has a small charm (mini bag), can also hang other bags or on the waist as an accessory 🙊🙊 Goes with any outfit 😘😘 girls hurry up, it's so beautiful 🙊🙊 Model: 1BH204, Dimensions: L22xH12xW6cm

items.name_en: Hello everyone, I have a new name, called Cabat
items.name_cn:
Hello everyone, I have a new name, called Cabat
Weave Mini Basket style~Finally can be worn on the shoulder
It is based on the original bag shape with an added shoulder strap
And it is detachable!
It's like getting the use of two bags for the price of one
As the ace little cutie of the BV family
I really can't help but not own a chain style!
This bag from our shop is truly identical to the authentic one
Spending a little money to make a big impression~
Original Cowhide: Size: 20*16*13cm, Model: 5211#

items.name_en: High Quality Details Perfect Details Original Hardware
items.name_cn:
High Quality Details Perfect Details Original Hardware
⭐️【ALMA BB Handbag】🚩 M59793 Beige🚩(Embroidered)
This Alma BB handbag embodies the essence of the 1930s Art Deco style, featuring a full-bodied quilted calfskin embroidered Monogram pattern, paired with embossed leather handles and a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for versatile carrying.
Dimensions: 24.5 x 18 x 12 cm
